title: RAYHER Willow Wreath, Ø 30cm x 7cm
features: Unpeeled willow wreath with a 30cm diameter and 7cm thickness.
Perfect home decoration year-round for Easter, Christmas, or any season or holiday.
Embellish it individually for winter with snow, felt, or glitter or alternatively for summer with colourful ribbons and flowers. The possibilities are endless.
All natural wood provides classic and versatile decor.
Please note the colour may vary slightly.
description: From the manufacturer Rayher Just Creative At Rayher, we have everything that sparks creativity! In the Rayher shop, creative fans will find a large selection of products and product proposals for their creative activities, DIY and handmade. Our extensive selection includes paper of all kinds, stamps, paints, casting and model making, jewellery making materials, children's products, accessories, seasonal and seasonal decoration and special occasions. With the 20,000 products on offer you huge choice and excellent quality. So everyone will find the equipment and tools they need, both beginners and DIYers from Sunday to DIY as well as hand-made professionals. Looking for ideas? On our website you will find more than 400 creative ideas in various areas as well as various DIY techniques with detailed instructions to try straight away. So you can always find inspiration for your own creations or create ideas that we sugg. With filter options you can target by theme, technique, completion time and difficulty level to find ideas and tips faster and easier. Following our motto: Being creative makes you happy. Everything that awakens creativity is at Rayher.
